title: Crystallized
description: A mod that adds many things like items, biomes, and dimensions related to crystals!
body:
![Crystallized Banner](https://github.com/ninjaguardian/Crystallized/blob/master/src/main/resources/title_banner_crystallized.png?raw=true)
---
#### This mod adds custom items, blocks, dimensions, biomes, and more things related to crystals. It is made to give miencarft more difficulty and progression.

## **FEATURES (so far)**
<details>
<summary>Combat related</summary>

    crystal sword
    crysyal pickaxe
    crystal axe
    crystal hoe
    crystal shove
    crystal armor

</details>    

<details>
<summary>Ore related</summary>

    crystal shard 
    crystal block
    crystal detector (helps you find crystal ore)
    crystal ore
    deepslate crystal ore
  
</details>


<details>
<summary>Wood related stuff</summary>
  
    crystallized fence & fence gate
    crystallized door & solid door (only opens by redstone)
    crystallized trapdoor & solid trapdoor (only opens by redstone)
    crystallized pressure plate
    crystallized stairs
    crystallized slab
    crystallized wall
    crystallized button
    custom tree generation (for crystal tree) 
    crystallized wood/planks/log + stripped versions
    crystallized leaves
    crystallized sapling
    
</details>


<details>
<summary>Blocks with uses</summary>
  
    crystallizer (turns items into crystallized items)

</details>

## **OTHER INFO**
- Not all items are craftable yet.
- Those that are can be found in the recipe book after obtaining **Crystal shards** from **Crystal ore**
- **Crystal ore** is found underground with a low chance. **(currently only in biomes that spawn crystal trees. This will be fixed when the custom biome is made. Sorry for any confusion)**
- Some items can be obtained from killing mobs and trading with villagers/wandering traders. I will make a list after custom villagers are made.
- This mod *may* work with 1.20.2 but forge changed many functions so im not sure how much longer it will work. I suggest using 1.20.1 because that is the version it is made for. I will not give support for 1.20.2!
- ### **THIS MOD IS STILL IN THE MAKING AND SOME THINGS MAY NOT BE ADDED YET!**
